ocr_findings.description: OCR line 23: '試験にはつしが出る！' — image clearly shows '試験にはコレが出る！' (stylized bold 'コレ' misread as 'つし' due to decorative font rendering)

reviewer_notes: Lesson 09-05 intro page on algorithms and flowcharts. Body text is well captured. The mascot callout banner font caused 'コレ' to be read as 'つし', which is a known stylized-font OCR failure mode. All substantive content (definitions, examples, key terms) is faithfully reproduced.
